tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Roy Hodgson, 78, returns to management at Bristol City after replacing Gerhard Struber for the rest of the season! He last managed a second-tier club in 1982. Can he turn the tide? ⚽️🔴 #BristolCity #HodgsonReturns
article_title: Roy Hodgson makes shock return to management at 78 with Bristol City

article_title: Ireland dreams end in shootout heartbreak after Krejci’s late goal rescues Czechs
